_schema: plan-plecs-harness.md §3 — validation_status gates evidence: 'unvalidated' models may be run but may NOT close the PLECS evidence gate (SOP S1-S7).
_readback: PLECS 4.8 here returns empty simulate Values; read a ToFile CSV from disk. See procedure-simulation-and-validation.md §1 and memory plecs-readback-tofile.

models.device: library '2-Level IGBT Conv.' — ideal switches, Rth only, NO datasheet Eon/Eoff loss tables
not_yet: datasheet SiC loss/thermal description (Eon/Eoff/Econd vs V,I,Tj) + Foster net
DC-side ammeter for inverter efficiency (P_dc vs P_ac)
defined steady-state traction operating point (seed is mid-startup ramp, f_e~5Hz at 0.2s)
S1-S7 SOP + 9-corner matrix + Wolfspeed/TI CRD calibration (S5)

models.device_model: plecs_models/wolfspeed/mosfet-with-diode/modules/CAB450M12XM3.xml (official Wolfspeed PLECS model, Version 4 2026-03-19; full Eon/Eoff/Err 4-D surface incl 800V@all Tj + Cauer net ~0.095 C/W)
models.loss_layer_status: ACTIVATED 2026-07-19 — official CAB450M12XM3 model loads+simulates on the library converter block. BUT the library block HIDES its per-device losses: SwitchLossCalculator (can't descend into the block) and PlecsProbe both read 0. A validated model needs DISCRETE Mosfet blocks (each therm=file:CAB450M12XM3, on a HeatSink) — recommended base: retarget the three_phase_grid_connected_pv_inverter (or t_type) thermal demo. See LOSS_LAYER_BUILD.md 'Structural fork'.
models.build_findings_2026_07_19: See data/plecs/HANDOFF.md. Device requires Type MosfetWithDiode (Mosfet/Igbt reject CAB450 gate-dependent conduction). Loss/Tj readout SOLVED: PlecsProbe with signal names 'Device conduction loss'/'Device switching loss'/'Device junction temp' -> ToFile (NOT 'MOSFET ...'). Device dissipates correctly (Ron=3.6mOhm verified electrically). BLOCKER: device->heatsink coupling does NOT reproduce from scratch-scripted .plecs (heatsink stays 25C, Tj runs away to 684C, heat flow 0) even copying the buck demo's byte-identical HeatSink+device geometry. Root cause: the coupling is a GUI-baked association (survives text-edits to a GUI-saved base -> buck+CAB450 gives 35.7W conduction, bounded Tj). No headless workaround (no plecs.save/add/connect in the 4.8 RPC surface).
models.method_for_all_topologies: Retarget a GUI-saved base that has discrete switches on heat sinks (coupling survives text edits); do NOT author on-heatsink devices from scratch.
models.base_2l_b6: data/plecs/2l_b6_rainflow_base/2l_b6_cab450_rainflow.plecs — the rainflow_counting demo (6 IGBT+6 diode 2L VSI + IM on a heat sink) retargeted headlessly to CAB450 (legacy Mosfet+bodydiode files). LOADS+SIMULATES ok:true. Uses legacy-mosfets/CAB450M12XM3.xml (class MOSFET, no gate-dependent conduction -> plain Mosfet block) + CustomVariables Rgon/Rgoff.
not_yet: CONFIRM per-switch coupling/readout in 2l_b6_cab450_rainflow (probe reads 0 -> wrong signal name/path for legacy plain Mosfet; a coupled Tj reads >=Ta=65C)
retarget operating point to 800V + a defined corner
